code: /** Resolve public folder assets for GitHub Pages basename */export default function getAssetUrl(path){if(!path)return'';if(/^https?:\/\//i.test(path))return path;const base=(process.env.PUBLIC_URL||'').replace(/\/$/,'');const normalized=path.replace(/^\//,'');return base?"".concat(base,"/").concat(normalized):"/".concat(normalized);}
